title: Internal Audit Section
subtitle: Evaluating internal controls and safeguarding local government assets.

servicesList.name: Internal Control System Evaluation
servicesList.desc: Regular assessment of office workflows, asset registries, and financial handling methods to identify system vulnerabilities.

servicesList.name: Post-Audit of Financial Transactions
servicesList.desc: Conducting comprehensive post-audits on high-value paid vouchers, payroll accounts, and procurement contracts.

servicesList.name: Management & Operations Audit
servicesList.desc: Reviewing local department operational workflows to ensure city programs are executed efficiently.

servicesList.name: Compliance Verification Tracking
servicesList.desc: Monitoring and assessing the implementation of Audit Observation Memorandums (AOM) issued by state auditors.
